summary: Frontend-only review for Trading Calculator PRO. Verified LandingPage testimonials/FAQ render with correct data-testids (testimonial-0..2 with 5 stars + name/role; faq-0..4 with toggle expanding answer). Confirmed auto-detect browser language: clearing trading-i18n-storage and reloading writes {locale:'en', autoDetected:true} (browser locale en). Validated Arabic RTL: html[dir=rtl] and lang=ar applied. Switched to 'de' and confirmed German testimonials section ('Was Trader sagen') and FAQ ('Häufig gestellte Fragen') render. Logged in as demo@btccalc.pro/1234 to test calculators. LeverageCalculator with balance=10000/entry=100/exit=110/lev=10x/LONG correctly computes movement=10%, PnL=+$10,000, ROE=100%, liquidation=$90 — this is the MATHEMATICALLY CORRECT leveraged-trading result. Edge guards verified across all calculators: no NaN/Infinity rendered with leverage=0, entry=0, entry===sl, buyPrice=0, currentPrice=0. PercentageCalculator happy-path renders without NaN.

issues: Several hardcoded Spanish strings remain in calculator UIs despite i18n migration: LeverageCalculator (lines ~175 'Simular' button, ~183 'Posición:', ~184 'Mov. Precio:', ~212 'Capital Final', ~223 'A X% del precio de entrada', ~231-232 explanation sentence with 'En LONG con Nx', ~240 'Limpiar'), PositionSizeCalculator (~132 'Calcular Posición', ~153 'Distancia SL', ~163 'Alto apalancamiento - Mayor riesgo de liquidación', ~172-173 'Con un riesgo del X%, si tu SL...', ~180 'Limpiar'). These render as Spanish even when locale=en/de/fr/etc.

action_items: REVIEW TEST EXPECTATION (NOT A CODE BUG): The review_request states for LeverageCalculator(balance=10000, entry=100, exit=110, lev=10, LONG) Expected PnL=+1000 ROI=10%. Actual rendered (and mathematically correct) values are PnL=+$10,000 and ROE=100%, because $10k capital × 10% move × 10x leverage = $10,000 PnL = 100% ROE on capital. The implementation in LeverageCalculator.jsx line 50 (pnl = cap*(priceMovement/100)*lev) is correct industry-standard leveraged-trading math. Either (a) the request expectation is wrong and should be updated, or (b) the formula was intended to be unleveraged in which case the LEV multiplier should be removed from lines 50/52. Recommend (a) — keep formula.
Replace remaining hardcoded Spanish strings in LeverageCalculator.jsx and PositionSizeCalculator.jsx with t() keys (see design_issues for list). Affects all 7 non-Spanish locales.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n.js is 11,358 lines — strongly recommend splitting per-locale files (translations.es.js, translations.en.js, ...) and importing dynamically. Single-file JSON-of-1300×8 keys is hard to maintain and inflates JS bundle for every locale a user does not need.

useI18nStore.t() does silent fallback to translations.es and finally returns the key string. When a key is missing in es, the raw key (e.g. 'testimonial1Quote_l010') is shown to the user. Consider warning in dev (console.warn) on missing key.

LandingPage TESTIMONIALS author/role keys exist as translation keys but the testimonial INITIAL ('C','A','D') is hardcoded — fine for now, but inconsistent if a translator changes the author name to one starting with a different letter.

detectBrowserLanguage runs every LandingPage mount via useEffect — guarded by autoDetected, but consider running once at app root (App.jsx) to centralize and avoid re-running when user navigates back to /.
test_credentials: demo@btccalc.pro / 1234 (premium lifetime, seeded). Login flow works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 LandingPage features (testimonials, FAQ, auto-detect lang, RTL) verified working. Calculator edge-case guards verified across LeverageCalculator/PositionSizeCalculator/SpotCalculator/PercentageCalculator/TargetPriceCalculator — no NaN/Infinity in any tested zero/division edge case. LeverageCalculator math is correct as implemented; the review_request's expected PnL=+1000 ROI=10% contradicts standard leveraged-trading math (correct values are +$10,000 and 100% ROE). Remaining cleanup: hardcoded Spanish strings in LeverageCalculator.jsx and PositionSizeCalculator.jsx (button labels, output labels, explanation sentences) — listed in design_issues. PositionSizeCalculator/SpotCalculator/TargetPriceCalculator happy-path numeric assertions could not be verified by my Playwright run due to nth-input ambiguity (DashboardPage shows multiple visible calculator panels with shared input[type=number] selectors); recommend main agent add data-testid on entry/sl/percentage inputs for those three calculators (currently only LeverageCalculator and PositionSizeCalculator/SpotCalculator have testids on the calculate button + balance/capital). The math itself is straightforward (verified by code review) and edge-guards are confirmed working.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bug confirmed. The PnL/ROI mismatch in the review_request is a documentation/expectation mismatch, not a code defect. Implementation: LeverageCalculator.jsx:50 → pnl = cap * (priceMovement/100) * lev. With cap=10000, priceMovement=10, lev=10 → pnl=10000. ROE = pnl/cap*100 = 100%. This matches how Binance/Bybit/etc. report leveraged P&L.
